question: The line chart shows revenue by year from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is supported by the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased each year from 2018 to 2020.
options.C: The revenues in 2021 and 2022 are equal.
options.D: Revenue in 2018 was higher than in 2019.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
